services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Every instrument treated with the care of a fine work of art
services.setup_desc: Action, intonation and pickup adjustment for the finest tone possible.
services.repair_desc: Fret, nut, saddle, tuning machine and all mechanical component repairs.
services.restoration_desc: Bringing vintage instruments back to their original pristine condition.
services.electronics_desc: Pickup replacement, jack, potentiometer and complete wiring repairs.

about.title: Passion & Craft
about.subtitle: More than two decades serving music lovers
about.description: Founded in 2000, Torigo was born from a pure love of music and the art of fine craftsmanship. We believe every guitar has a story, and our mission is to help those stories continue to resound.
about.description2: From soulful blues to fiery flamenco, we have accompanied thousands of artists on their journey to rediscovering perfect sound.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Transparent, professional process from start to finish
process.step1_desc: Bring your guitar to the workshop. We inspect it thoroughly and discuss the issues together.
process.step2_desc: Detailed assessment of the instrument's condition and planning the optimal repair approach.
process.step3_desc: Meticulous handcraft with premium materials, delivered on time as promised.
process.step4_desc: Final inspection together, care instructions provided, and your guitar goes home singing.

testimonials.title: Words from Our Clients
testimonials.subtitle: Our clients' joy is the measure of our success
testimonials.t1_content: Outstanding! My Taylor now sounds better than when it was new. The team is incredibly professional and dedicated.
testimonials.t2_content: Had the pickup replaced and action adjusted on my Les Paul. The result exceeded all expectations. Will definitely return.
testimonials.t3_content: Completely restored my 50-year-old vintage Martin. They achieved the impossible, respecting every tiny detail.

about_page.hero_subtitle: A journey of more than two decades devoted to music and the art of fine craftsmanship
about_page.story_p1: Founded in 2000 in a small workshop on Pho Hue Street, Torigo was born from a pure love of music and the art of traditional craftsmanship. Founder Nguyen Van Thanh spent his youth learning woodworking and guitar techniques from the most skilled craftsmen in Hanoi.
about_page.story_p2: More than two decades later, we have accompanied thousands of musicians — from first-time students to professional artists — in their quest to rediscover the perfect sound in each beloved instrument. Every guitar that passes through our hands is treated as a work of art.
about_page.value1_desc: Every smallest detail is carefully attended to. We never compromise on quality, no matter how small the task.
about_page.value2_desc: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. We give straightforward advice so you can make the best decision for your instrument.
about_page.value3_desc: Every guitar has its own story. We listen, understand, and work with all our professional passion to deliver the best result.

philosophy.quote: A good guitar is one with action suited to the playing style, excellent playability, and aesthetics that match its owner.
philosophy.description: We believe every guitar holds untapped potential. Our craft is unlocking it — through patient assessment, precise adjustment, and a deep respect for each instrument's unique character.
philosophy.action_desc: Perfect string height for effortless playing
philosophy.tone_desc: Resonance and sustain brought to full life
philosophy.aesthetics_desc: Beauty and craft in every finish

instruments.title: Built for Every Guitar
instruments.electric_desc: Action, intonation, fret levelling, pickup height optimisation, and complete electronics service.
instruments.acoustic_desc: Nut & saddle setup, neck relief adjustment, bridge reshaping, and humidity care guidance.
instruments.bass_desc: Low-action optimisation, truss rod adjustment, string height and pickup balance for deep tone.
instruments.classical_desc: Nylon-string specific action setup, neck angle correction, and fingerboard dressing.

warranty.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed on Every Service
warranty.description: If your guitar's playability changes within 30 days of our work, we will re-adjust at no extra cost. Seasonal humidity changes excluded.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before bringing your guitar in
faq.setup_q1: How long does a full setup take?
faq.setup_a1: A basic setup takes 1–2 days. A full setup takes 2–3 days. Complex repairs or vintage restorations may take 1–4 weeks depending on scope. We always confirm the exact timeline after inspecting your instrument.
faq.setup_q2: What is included in a basic setup?
faq.setup_a2: A basic setup includes: string replacement, action adjustment (saddle and truss rod), intonation tuning, nut slot cleaning, tuning machine lubrication, and a full playability check — everything needed for comfortable daily playing.
faq.setup_q3: Do you work on all guitar brands?
faq.setup_a3: Yes. We service all brands — Fender, Gibson, Martin, Taylor, Yamaha, Squier, Epiphone, and Vietnamese brands alike. Our 20+ years of experience covers acoustic, electric, bass, and classical guitars of all origins and ages.
faq.setup_q4: Can I watch my guitar being worked on?
faq.setup_a4: You are welcome to observe during drop-off and the final inspection. Due to workshop space, please arrange this in advance. For complex restorations, we can photograph key stages and share them with you.
faq.booking_q1: How do I book an appointment?
faq.booking_a1: Book online via our booking form, message us on Zalo or WhatsApp, or walk in during business hours. Advance booking is recommended to ensure the right craftsman is ready for your instrument.
faq.booking_a2: Reschedules and cancellations are accepted with 24 hours' notice at no charge. For same-day cancellations, a small consultation fee may apply if materials were already prepared for your instrument.
faq.booking_a3: Same-day service is available for basic string changes and minor adjustments, subject to workshop schedule. Setup, fret levelling, and repairs require a proper booking to ensure quality results.
faq.booking_q4: Do I need to drop off my guitar?
faq.booking_a4: Yes — all work is done in our workshop where we have the proper tools, lighting, and environment. Drop-off and pickup is at our Hanoi workshop. For large collections or special circumstances, contact us to discuss arrangements.
faq.pricing_q1: How much does a full setup cost?
faq.pricing_a1: A full setup ranges from 700,000 to 1,200,000 VND depending on guitar type and condition. This includes all labour and consumables. Strings are quoted separately. We always provide a fixed price before starting — no surprises.
faq.pricing_q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.pricing_a2: We accept cash (VND), bank transfer, MoMo, and ZaloPay. Payment is due on pickup. For restoration projects over 2,000,000 VND or special parts orders, a 30–50% deposit may be requested.
faq.pricing_a3: A deposit is only required for: (1) restorations over 2,000,000 VND, or (2) orders requiring special parts to be sourced. For standard setups and repairs, payment in full is due on pickup.
faq.pricing_q4: Are parts included in the service price?
faq.pricing_a4: Labour and consumables (lubricants, cleaning products) are always included. Replacement parts — nuts, saddles, tuning machines, pickups, strings — are quoted separately and installed only with your approval. No hidden costs.
faq.warranty_a1: The warranty covers any change in playability — action, intonation, buzzing — directly caused by our work. If your guitar plays differently within 30 days for reasons attributable to our service, we re-adjust at no charge.
faq.warranty_a2: The warranty does not apply if: the guitar is exposed to extreme humidity or temperature changes; strings are changed to a significantly different gauge; the instrument is altered by another technician; or physical damage occurs after the service.
faq.warranty_q3: How do I claim warranty service?
faq.warranty_a3: Contact us by phone, Zalo, or our booking form and describe the issue. Bring the guitar to the workshop with your service receipt. We will inspect it and, if the issue falls within warranty scope, perform the adjustment at no charge within 48 hours.
faq.warranty_q4: Does Vietnam's humidity affect my guitar setup?
faq.warranty_a4: Yes. Seasonal humidity changes — especially Hanoi's dry winters and humid summers — can shift neck relief and action. This is normal wood behaviour and is explicitly excluded from the 30-day warranty. We recommend seasonal check-ups and can advise on humidifiers and storage solutions.

price_list.title: Price List
price_list.subtitle: Fixed quotes before we start. No surprises.
price_list.note: Prices may vary based on guitar condition. All services include a free initial assessment.
price_list.service_basic_desc: Action, intonation, string change, nut slot cleaning
price_list.service_fret_desc: Fret crown, level, and polish for even playability
price_list.service_nut_desc: Bone or TUSQ nut fitting and slot cutting
price_list.service_electronics_desc: Pickup swap, wiring, jack and pot repair
price_list.service_brace_desc: Internal brace reglue, crack repair, structural work
price_list.warranty_section_desc: All setup work includes a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If your guitar's playability changes within 30 days due to our work, we will re-adjust at no extra cost. Seasonal humidity changes excluded.
